goals.title: Build the check macOS menu-bar-only utility MVP from .omo/plans/remot...
goals.objective: Build the check macOS menu-bar-only utility MVP from .omo/plans/remote-work-mac-native-app.md. Deliver a SwiftUI MenuBarExtra app named check with Bundle ID kingcheck, no main app window, Korean minimal popover UI, Supabase local schema for teams/memberships/work_statuses/work_sessions seeded with team 'sudo 박수' and test emails yehsungjohn34@gmail.com and ysiig78@gmail.com, safe Supabase config that does not commit the anon JWT, and direct-install packaging via dist/check.zip. Use TDD and evidence-bound QA.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel. Baseline RED before scaffold: create .omo/ulw-loop/evidence, run tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-c001 "cd /Users/yesung/check && xcodebuild test -scheme check -destination 'platform=macOS'; printf 'EXIT:%s\n' \$?", capture pane to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-red.txt, then kill the tmux session. After implementation run tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-c001 "cd /Users/yesung/check && xcodebuild test -scheme check -destination 'platform=macOS' && ./scripts/build-local.sh; printf 'EXIT:%s\n' \$?", capture pane to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-green.txt, then kill tmux. Also run open on the built check.app and capture OS-level action log to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-app-launch.txt. PASS iff scheme check builds/tests, Bundle ID kingcheck is present in app metadata, MenuBarExtra source exists, app launch creates no main-window scene, and cleanup receipt confirms tmux/app process cleanup.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-red.txt + .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-green.txt + .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-app-launch.txt with cleanup receipt for tmux/app process
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-red.txt; GREEN: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-green.txt; app launch: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-app-launch.txt; final smoke: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-final-smoke.txt; xcodebuild test passed with 9 tests, dist/check.app Bundle ID kingcheck, LSUIElement true, runtime smoke launched and killed.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux + CLI/DB channel. Baseline RED before schema: run tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-c002 "cd /Users/yesung/check && test -f supabase/migrations/*create_check_schema.sql && rg 'sudo 박수|yehsungjohn34@gmail.com|ysiig78@gmail.com|work_sessions|work_statuses|alter table .* enable row level security' supabase; printf 'EXIT:%s\n' \$?", capture pane to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C002-red.txt, kill tmux. After implementation run tmux command: cd /Users/yesung/check && supabase db reset && ./scripts/qa-schema.sh; capture stdout to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C002-green.txt, kill tmux. PASS iff schema includes teams/memberships/work_statuses/work_sessions, seed uses sudo 박수 and both test emails, RLS is enabled, user-open-session uniqueness exists, and cleanup receipt confirms no tmux/container leftovers created by this criterion.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C002-red.txt; GREEN: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C002-green.txt; REST smoke: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-supabase-rest-smoke.txt; final smoke: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-final-smoke.txt; supabase db reset passed with read/write RLS policies; Auth login, status read, start upsert, stop update all passed; cleanup: supabase stop and docker check no project containers.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux + CLI channel. Baseline RED before packaging: run tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-c003 "cd /Users/yesung/check && ./scripts/package-local.sh; printf 'EXIT:%s\n' \$?", capture pane to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C003-red.txt, kill tmux. After implementation run tmux command: cd /Users/yesung/check && ./scripts/qa-permissions.sh && ./scripts/package-local.sh && unzip -l dist/check.zip; capture stdout to .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C003-green.txt, kill tmux. Also run rg to prove no Supabase JWT is committed. PASS iff dist/check.zip contains check.app, qa-permissions reports no Accessibility/Screen Recording/Camera/Microphone/Location permissions, rg finds no anon JWT token in tracked files, and cleanup receipt confirms tmux/temp cleanup.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C003-red.txt; GREEN: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C003-green.txt; final smoke: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-final-smoke.txt; qa-permissions passed, dist/check.zip contains check.app, rg found no supplied Supabase JWT fragments outside ignored artifacts; cleanup: no background process.

goals.evidence: Implemented SwiftUI MenuBarExtra app check with Bundle ID kingcheck, Supabase Auth/REST team status sync, RLS schema/seed for sudo 박수, direct dist/check.zip package. Verification: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-final-smoke.txt, .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-supabase-rest-smoke.txt, C001/C002/C003 GREEN evidence.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019ec0f6-c383-7f90-b18e-6f04ee928b87/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019ec0f6-c383-7f90-b18e-6f04ee928b87/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: Implemented SwiftUI MenuBarExtra app check with Bundle ID kingcheck, Supabase Auth/REST team status sync, RLS schema/seed for sudo 박수, direct dist/check.zip package. Verification: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-final-smoke.txt, .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-supabase-rest-smoke.txt, C001/C002/C003 GREEN evidence.
